key.name: container-runtime
key.description: The container runtime to use (podman or docker)

key.name: terminal
key.description: The terminal program and arguments to use for shell, logs, stats, and top commands

key.name: open-dialog-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to open or close the containers dialog

key.name: indicator-display
key.description: How the panel indicator is displayed

key.name: default-status-filter
key.description: Status filter selected when the dialog opens without remembered state

key.name: remember-dialog-state
key.description: Whether to remember search and filter state between dialog openings

key.name: show-stopped
key.description: Whether stopped containers are visible in the dialog

key.name: favorites-only
key.description: Whether only favorite containers are visible in the dialog

key.name: show-hidden
key.description: Whether hidden containers are visible in the dialog

key.name: hidden-container-ids
key.description: Container IDs hidden from the dialog by the user

key.name: search-text
key.description: Last search text used in the dialog
